news.paragraph: Costco is seeing positive momentum following reports of strong retail sales in April. Most other recent news headlines are unrelated to the company, focusing instead on geopolitical tensions and airline industry costs. No imminent catalysts such as earnings or regulatory actions are indicated in the current news cycle.
headlines: Should Investors Buy Costco Stock Now After Strong April Retail Sales?
